mapper.select: SELECT p.ITEM_NO as id, p.ITEM_NO as itemNo, gvi.CONTENT as nameVi, gen.CONTENT as nameEn, gzh.CONTENT as nameZh, gko.CONTENT as nameKo, p.CAL_ORDER as calOrder FROM AR_STA_ITEM_PARAM p LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON p.ITEM_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON p.ITEM_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON p.ITEM_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON p.ITEM_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE p.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND p.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY p.CAL_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE AR_STA_FORMULAR SET CONDITION = #{condition}, FORMULAR = #{formular}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, ORDERNO = #{orderno}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE FORMULAR_NO = #{formularNo}
mapper.select: SELECT T.ITEM_NO as "itemNo", S1.CONTENT as "itemName", PA.CAL_ORDER as "calOrder", T.STA_ITEM_ID as "staItemId", T.DATATYPE as "dataType", S2.CONTENT as "dataTypeName" FROM AR_STA_ITEM T JOIN AR_STA_ITEM_PARAM PA ON T.ITEM_NO = PA.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME S1 ON PA.ITEM_NO = S1.NO AND S1.LANGUAGE = #{lang} LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME S2 ON T.DATATYPE = S2.NO AND S2.LANGUAGE = #{lang} WHERE PA.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND T.ACTIVITY = 1 AND PA.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY PA.CAL_ORDER

SELECT D.DISTINCT_FIELD as "distinctField", S1.CONTENT as "fieldName" FROM PA_DISTINCT_LIST D LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME S1 ON D.ID = S1.NO AND S1.LANGUAGE = #{lang} WHERE D.TABLE_NAME = 'PA_HR_V' AND D.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND D.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY D.ORDERNO
